creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hi,
 
 As mentioned in the Makefile, the graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool tracks the 
 "Production release" as designated by the author, Phil Harvey, on his web 
 page at http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html
 
 As indicated on that page, the current production release of exiftool is 
 version 8.90.
 
 If you want to use a non-production release, please update the 
 graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel port instead.
 
 Thanks,
 -- 
 Tod McQuillin
 graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool maintainer
